auth.welcomeBack: Welcome back! Here's an overview of your business.

hero.subtitle: A modern, modular ERP system built for the future. Manage inventory, customers, finances, and employees—all in one beautiful platform.

features.title: Everything You Need to Run Your Business
features.subtitle: A complete suite of tools designed to streamline operations and boost productivity.

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.description: Track products, manage stock levels, set reorder points, and monitor supplier relationships in real-time.

crm.title: CRM & Customer Pipeline
crm.description: Manage customer relationships, track leads through your sales pipeline, and boost conversion rates.

finance.title: Finance & Accounting
finance.description: Handle invoices, track transactions, manage orders, and get complete financial visibility.

hr.title: HR & Employee Management
hr.description: Manage employees, departments, leave requests, and streamline your HR processes.

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.description: Get real-time insights with beautiful charts and KPIs to make data-driven decisions.

security.title: Multi-Tenant Security
security.description: Enterprise-grade security with complete data isolation between organizations.

benefits.title: Built for Modern Businesses
benefits.subtitle: Deftra combines powerful features with an intuitive interface, giving you everything you need to manage your business efficiently.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Business?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of businesses already using Deftra to streamline their operations.

landing.footer: © 2024 Deftra. Built with Next.js, Prisma & PostgreSQL.

array.inclusive: Array must contain at least {{minimum}} element(s)
array.not_inclusive: Array must contain more than {{minimum}} element(s)

string.inclusive: String must contain at least {{minimum}} character(s)

number.inclusive: Number must be greater than or equal to {{minimum}}

date.exact: Date must be exactly {{- minimum, datetime}}
date.inclusive: Date must be greater than or equal to {{- minimum, datetime}}
date.not_inclusive: Date must be greater than {{- minimum, datetime}}

array.inclusive: Array must contain at most {{maximum}} element(s)
array.not_inclusive: Array must contain less than {{maximum}} element(s)

string.inclusive: String must contain at most {{maximum}} character(s)

number.inclusive: Number must be less than or equal to {{maximum}}

date.exact: Date must be exactly {{- maximum, datetime}}
date.inclusive: Date must be smaller than or equal to {{- maximum, datetime}}
date.not_inclusive: Date must be smaller than {{- maximum, datetime}}
